365	    def get_send_file_max_age(self, filename: str | None) -> int | None:
   366	        """Used by :func:`send_file` to determine the ``max_age`` cache
   367	        value for a given file path if it wasn't passed.
   368	
   369	        By default, this returns :data:`SEND_FILE_MAX_AGE_DEFAULT` from
   370	        the configuration of :data:`~flask.current_app`. This defaults
   371	        to ``None``, which tells the browser to use conditional requests
   372	        instead of a timed cache, which is usually preferable.
   373	        ...
   381	        """
   382	        value = self.config["SEND_FILE_MAX_AGE_DEFAULT"]
   383	
   384	        if value is None:
   385	            return None
   386	
   387	        if isinstance(value, timedelta):
   388	            return int(value.total_seconds())
   389	
   390	        return value  # type: ignore[no-any-return]
